entry.title: New: RES26-081 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF AIR TRANSPORTATION AND LODGING, VALUED AT $1,850.00 TO THE CITY FROM HARVARD KENNEDY SCHOOL FOR A MEMBER FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN RESOURCES AND THE DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION SERVICES TO PARTICIPATE IN THE HARVARD KENNEDY SCHOOL'S 2ND ANNUAL STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT CAREER EXPO AND FORUM IN CAMBRIDGE, MASSACHUSETTS, FROM APRIL 16 TO APRIL 17, 2026.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
